Quiet Title/Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-03-2007 Continued To May-31-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up/Quieting Title to Real Property Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Terrel J. Mason, Esq. for Plaintiff: Margaret McAlindon Caron Schmierer, Special Admininstrator of the Estate of Harry McAlindon.
Plaintiff's Witness: Caron Schmiere, Margaret McAlindon and Phillip Campbell, were sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit 1---Sonoma County's Probate Order dtd 05-03-06 & Tax information---------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---1990 through 2006 Tax Accessement & payment checks-------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Accessor's Map-------------------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 4---Accessor's Information-----------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 5---Photograph-----------------------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 6---Sonama County's Probate Order dtd 08-08-06---------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court taken the matter under submission, Judgment is pending the entry of the 2 non-defaulted defendants by the Default Unit.
Matter is put over to May 31, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, no appearance is necessary.
Proposed Judgment rec'd in court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the exihibits in open court.
May 04-07
Judgment Quieting Title to real property signed by Comm. Kaplan.
